mapper.select: select id,u_id,video_name, video_type, score from score where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO movies_release_year (movie_id, year) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{releaseYear})

INSERT IGNORE INTO movies_genres (movie_id, genre_id) VALUES
(#{movieId}, #{genreId})
mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM countries WHERE short_name IN
#{shortName}
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO movies_countries (movie_id, country_id) VALUES
(#{movieId}, #{countryId})
INSERT IGNORE INTO tv_release_year (tv_id, year) VALUES (#{tvId}, #{releaseYear})

INSERT IGNORE INTO tv_genres (tv_id, genre_id) VALUES
(#{tvId}, #{genreId})
mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM countries WHERE short_name IN
#{shortName}
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO tv_countries (tv_id, country_id) VALUES
(#{tvId}, #{countryId})

insert into score(id,u_id,video_name,video_type,score) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.uId},#{entity.videoName},#{entity.videoType},#{entity.score})
on duplicate key update id=values(id), u_id=values(u_id), video_name=values(video_name), video_type=values(video_type), score=values(score)
mapper.update:
update score
id = #{id},
u_id = #{uId},
video_name = #{videoName},
video_type = #{videoType},
score = #{score},
where id = #{id}
